text:
Definition 
P = Blind — Prior to Age 31, 1967 Definition 
R = Insured Under Special Insured Status Provision for Young Disabled 
S = Blind — Original Definition 
T = Blind, Prior to Age 31, Original Definition 
U = Short-Term Disability 
X = No Waiting Period 
Missing = no record of SSA disability determination 

COMMENT: CMS obtains information regarding SSA disability benefits and stores it as part of the Common 
Medicare Environment (CME) database. 

This field is new starting with MBSF ABCD
